title: tk tui — unified terminal app
description:
Build the unified terminal app from docs/design/tui-unified-app.md. Hard-depends on the end-state data model (project tree + target_date); soft-ordered after the skill docs; gated with a checkpoint because it is a large, distinct surface.

Rename tk view→tk tui (no alias). Root model + child view-models; adaptive 3/2/1-pane layout; sidebar (smart views + project tree); main pane view tabs (List/Board/Roadmap/Timeline); ⌘K palette; inline editing + mouse + persisted UI state. Architecture-first build order. Strong e2e harness is a first-class deliverable.

Deliverables:
- tk tui shell + focus routing + List view (rename, no alias)
- ⌘K command palette
- editable detail pane
- Board view (4 columns; Awaiting as its own lane)
- Roadmap tab (fold existing renderer) + Timeline (off target_date)
- UI state persistence (.tick/.tui-state.json, gitignored)
- e2e harness: Update unit tests + teatest goldens + tmux smokes
